# validate.accuracy_by_segment_size { #tspaint.validate.accuracy_by_segment_size }

```python
tspaint.validate.accuracy_by_segment_size(
    tracks,
    truth_states,
    bins=None,
    samples=None,
    exclude_missing=True,
)
```

Per-base painting accuracy stratified by **true** ancestry-tract length.

The headline of the segment-length analysis (CLAUDE.md §9): tract-/copying-based methods
degrade as tracts shorten, so accuracy as a function of true segment size separates methods
that hold up on short (old-admixture) tracts from those that don't. Each true tract is
assigned to a length bin; within it, the span where the painter's ``argmax`` matches the true
state counts as correct, aggregated per bin.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**tracks**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Posterior segment tracks per sample.

<code>[**truth_states**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [int](`int`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   True ancestry-state tracts per sample (e.g. from :func:`map_truth`).

<code>[**bins**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Monotone tract-length bin edges in bp (``len(bins) - 1`` bins). Defaults to :data:`DEFAULT_SIZE_BINS`.

<code>[**samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Samples to score; defaults to all keys of ``tracks``.

<code>[**exclude_missing**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If True, skip :data:`tspaint.output.MISSING_INFO` spans.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Keys ``"edges"`` (the bin edges), ``"accuracy"``, ``"weight"`` (scored span) and ``"n_segments"`` — each a 1-D array over the bins. ``accuracy`` is ``nan`` in empty bins.
